title: Customer interview — Northwind Trading
text:
# Interview: Northwind Trading (Enterprise)
Date: 2026-05-21
Interviewer: UX Research

Q: What's your biggest frustration?
A: Honestly, Integrations. It slows the whole team down and there's no 'SSO/SAML support'.

Q: If we fixed one thing?
A: Give us 'SSO/SAML support'. We'd expand our seat count if you did.

Q: How does this compare to alternatives?
A: A competitor already offers this, which is why we're evaluating switching.
